name: recordJvmFlightRecording
description: Record one short Java Flight Recorder session for a target JVM and return the .jfr path plus a lightweight summary. 中文：为目标 JVM 录制一次短时 JFR，并返回 .jfr 路径与 GC/分配/线程等摘要。 Requires a non-blank confirmationToken and an absolute jfrOutputPath ending in .jfr. Example: {"request":{"pid":12345,"durationSeconds":30,"settings":"profile","jfrOutputPath":"C:/tmp/app.jfr","maxSummaryEvents":200000,"confirmationToken":"user-approved"}}

confirmationToken.description: Non-blank caller-provided approval token required for JFR recording.

durationSeconds.description: Recording duration in seconds; null uses the server default, usually 30.

jfrOutputPath.description: Absolute output path for the recording file; must end in .jfr and must not already exist.

maxSummaryEvents.description: Maximum number of JFR events to parse for the summary; null uses the server default.

pid.description: Target JVM process id (decimal); should match a PID from listJavaApps.

settings.description: JFR settings template: default or profile. Blank uses profile.

request.description: JfrRecordingRequest JSON: pid, durationSeconds, settings, jfrOutputPath, maxSummaryEvents, confirmationToken.
